metadata.name: GithubStarsIndex
metadata.description: 自动抓取 GitHub Stars，生成 AI 摘要，便于检索。

summary.zh: 该工具自动抓取 GitHub Stars 并调用 AI 生成内容摘要与技术标签，内置标签归一化治理机制。支持 GitHub Actions 定时同步、并发处理及增量更新，可一键部署至 GitHub Pages 或同步至 Obsidian，将零散的 Star 列表转化为可检索的结构化知识库。
summary.en: Automatically fetches GitHub Stars and generates AI summaries with normalized technical tags. Features concurrent processing, incremental updates, and GitHub Actions scheduling. Supports deployment to GitHub Pages or sync with Obsidian, transforming scattered Star lists into a searchable, structured knowledge base.

metadata.name: GithubStarsManager
metadata.description: An app for managing github starred repositories.

summary.zh: GithubStarsManager 是一款全平台桌面应用，旨在解决 GitHub 星标仓库管理难题。它利用 AI 自动总结、分类并实现精准语义检索，支持发布跟踪、一键下载及 Fork/Gist 管理。数据 100% 本地存储，兼顾隐私与高效，是开发者整理知识资产的理想工具。
summary.en: GithubStarsManager is a cross-platform desktop app designed to solve GitHub starred repository management challenges. It leverages AI for automatic summarization, categorization, and precise semantic search. Supporting release tracking, one-click downloads, and Fork/Gist management, it stores data 100% locally, balancing privacy and efficiency as an ideal tool for developers to organize knowledge assets.

metadata.name: sms_forwarding
metadata.description: 超低成本硬件短信转发器，支持移动联通电信，ML307R+ESP32C3

summary.zh: 这是一个基于ESP32C3和ML307R的低成本短信转发器项目。它支持移动、联通、电信卡，通过AT指令实现短信接收与多通道推送（如Bark、钉钉、飞书）。项目提供Web界面配置，支持长短信合并与远程管理，是个人短信通知与保号管理的理想硬件方案。
summary.en: This project is a low-cost SMS forwarding device based on ESP32C3 and ML307R. It supports China Mobile, Unicom, and Telecom cards, forwarding received SMS to multiple channels like Bark, DingTalk, and Feishu via AT commands. Featuring a Web UI for configuration and long SMS merging, it is an ideal hardware solution for personal SMS notifications and number retention management.

metadata.name: QwenPaw
metadata.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabilities.

summary.zh: QwenPaw 是一款个人 AI 助手，支持本地与云端私有化部署，确保数据隐私与完全可控。它具备多平台消息聚合能力，内置 PDF 处理、日程管理及新闻摘要等可扩展技能，为用户提供安全、高效且高度定制化的智能交互体验。
summary.en: QwenPaw is a privacy-first personal AI assistant supporting flexible local or cloud deployment. It integrates multiple chat channels and offers extensible skills like document processing and scheduling. Users retain full control over memory and data, ensuring a secure, customizable, and efficient intelligent experience.

metadata.name: Selene-TV
metadata.description: 以 MoonTV v100 版本 / Helios 为后端的 Android TV 客户端，针对遥控器设备优化

summary.zh: Selene-TV 是一款专为 Android TV 打造的沉浸式视频客户端，基于 Kotlin 和 Jetpack Compose for TV 构建。它深度优化了遥控器操作，支持多源聚合搜索、智能测速及多平台弹幕聚合。内置双播放内核（ExoPlayer/mpv）与手机扫码遥控功能，提供影院级观影体验，完美适配大屏设备。
summary.en: Selene-TV is an immersive Android TV client built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose for TV, optimized for remote control navigation. It features multi-source aggregation, intelligent speed testing, and cross-platform danmaku support. With dual playback engines (ExoPlayer/mpv) and a built-in mobile remote via QR code, it delivers a premium cinematic experience on big screens.

metadata.description: nine one

summary.zh: 个人私有视频站系统，支持115云盘、PikPak、OneDrive等多云盘后端接入。核心亮点包括302模式低带宽播放、自动生成视频封面与预览片段、短视频沉浸式浏览模式。提供一键脚本和Docker Compose两种部署方式，内置前后端管理界面，适合个人搭建私有媒体库。
summary.en: Personal private video streaming platform supporting multiple cloud storage backends including 115 Cloud, PikPak, OneDrive, and Google Drive. Key features include 302 redirect mode for bandwidth-efficient playback, automatic thumbnail and preview generation, and TikTok-style short video mode. Offers one-click script and Docker Compose deployment with built-in admin interface for personal media library management.

metadata.name: vpn-configs-for-russia
metadata.description: 🗽Бесплатные и проверенные VPN конфигурации, работающие в РФ ⚪ Белые списки / обход белых списков ⚪ Free and checked VPN configurations that work in Russia ⚪ Whitelists bypass

summary.zh: 专为俄罗斯用户打造的免费 VPN 配置仓库，提供 VLESS、Trojan 等多种协议的订阅链接。通过每两小时自动测试速度与可用性，过滤无效节点，旨在帮助用户绕过网络封锁，保持在线。支持导入至 v2rayN 等主流客户端，确保持续稳定的网络连接。
summary.en: A repository offering free, verified VPN configurations specifically for Russia, supporting protocols like VLESS, Trojan, and Shadowsocks. Configs undergo automated testing every 2 hours to ensure speed and availability, filtering out ineffective nodes. Designed to bypass Roskomnadzor blocks, it provides TXT subscriptions compatible with clients like v2rayN for stable connectivity.

summary.zh: 3x-ui 是 Xray-core 的 Web 控制面板，核心亮点包括一键协议模板、中转落地分流、多服务器批量下发及扫码导入。支持 SQLite/PostgreSQL，界面中文化优化，旨在通过自动化流程降低代理节点搭建门槛，适合个人学习与多节点运维管理。
summary.en: 3x-ui is a web-based Xray-core panel, a specialized fork of MHSanaei's version. Key features include one-click protocol templates, relay/landing splitting, multi-server deployment, and QR code import. Supporting SQLite/PostgreSQL with Chinese localization, it aims to automate proxy node setup, lowering the barrier for personal learning and multi-node operations.

summary.zh: X-Spider 是一款专为 X（推特）设计的媒体下载工具，支持批量抓取图片与视频。具备日期筛选、自动去重及代理配置功能。项目现由新维护者接手，采用 AI 辅助开发模式，致力于快速响应需求并保持软件稳定更新。
summary.en: X-Spider is a dedicated media downloader for X (Twitter), supporting batch downloading of images and videos. It features date filtering, automatic deduplication, and proxy configuration. The project is now maintained by a new owner using AI-assisted development to ensure rapid updates and stability.

metadata.name: XHTTP-Installer
metadata.description: VLESS+XHTTP+TLS Auto-Installer for Ubuntu — Vercel / Netlify relay

summary.zh: XHTTP-Installer是一款基于VLESS+XHTTP+TLS协议的自动化代理部署工具，通过Vercel/Netlify CDN实现服务器IP隐藏。支持一键安装、自动SSL证书配置及智能故障修复，适用于需要高隐私保护的网络环境，结合Xray-core与边缘计算架构提升传输安全性与速度。
summary.en: XHTTP-Installer is an automated proxy deployment tool using VLESS+XHTTP+TLS protocols with Vercel/Netlify CDN relay for IP masking. Features one-click setup, auto SSL provisioning, and self-healing capabilities. Ideal for privacy-focused networks, leveraging Xray-core and edge computing for enhanced security and performance.

metadata.name: lxserver
metadata.description: LX Music 数据同步服务端，同时支持了部分lx-music-desktop的网页端实现。

summary.zh: 本项目是 LX Music 的增强版数据同步服务端，内置功能强大的 Web 播放器。支持多源聚合搜索、多平台歌单管理、自动化缓存及 Subsonic 协议适配。提供现代化 UI、歌词卡片分享及访问控制，实现跨设备无缝音乐体验与私有化部署。
summary.en: This is an enhanced LX Music sync server featuring a powerful built-in Web Player. It supports multi-source search, playlist management, automated caching, and Subsonic protocol compatibility. With modern UI, lyric card sharing, and access control, it enables seamless cross-device music streaming and private deployment.

summary.zh: 本项目提供基于 Docker 与 Cloudflare Worker 的直播源聚合部署方案，支持 TXT/M3U 格式订阅。用户可一键搭建个人电视端直播服务，解决非大陆服务器部署难题，适配 OK 影视等 TV 壳子，实现频道自定义与资源自动更新。
summary.en: This project offers a live stream aggregation deployment solution based on Docker and Cloudflare Worker, supporting TXT/M3U subscription formats. Users can quickly set up personal TV streaming services, resolve deployment issues on non-mainland servers, and customize channels for apps like OK Player with auto-updating resources.

summary.zh: 本项目是张雪峰高考志愿填报决策知识库，旨在打破普通家庭的信息差。它不仅是数据匹配工具，更提供包含 AI 时代校正的决策框架。支持一键部署为 OpenClaw Skills 接入微信，或导入 Dify 等 RAG 平台，让普通用户通过 AI 顾问获得专业指导。
summary.en: This open-source project provides a Gaokao volunteer decision-making knowledge base inspired by Zhang Xuefeng, aiming to bridge information gaps for ordinary families. It offers a decision framework with AI-era corrections, supporting deployment as OpenClaw Skills for WeChat or importing into RAG platforms like Dify for AI advisory services.

metadata.name: zhangxuefeng-skill
metadata.description: 张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

summary.zh: 本项目构建了张雪峰认知操作系统，将高考志愿、考研及职业规划经验转化为可运行的 AI 思维框架。基于 Agent Skills 标准，支持多运行时环境，提炼核心心智模型与决策启发式，为用户提供实战级咨询辅助。
summary.en: This project builds Zhang Xuefeng's Cognitive OS, transforming expertise in college admissions and career planning into a runnable AI framework. Compliant with Agent Skills standards and multi-runtime environments, it extracts core mental models to provide practical consulting assistance.

metadata.name: K-Vault
metadata.description: 基于 Cloudflare 的 Serverless 聚合云盘。以 Telegram 为核心（支持 Webhook 直传与 2GB 扩展），并全面兼容 R2、S3、Discord 及 HuggingFace 等多存储后端。零成本构建你的全能私有数据金库。

summary.zh: K-Vault 是一款基于 Cloudflare Serverless 的聚合云盘解决方案，以 Telegram 为核心，全面兼容 R2、S3、Discord 等多存储后端。支持 Docker 与 Pages 双模部署，提供无限存储、API 上传及 WebDAV 功能，助您零成本构建全能私有数据金库，实现文件的高效托管与分享。
summary.en: K-Vault is a Serverless aggregated cloud drive built on Cloudflare, centering on Telegram while supporting R2, S3, Discord, and more. It offers dual deployment via Docker and Pages, featuring unlimited storage, API uploads, and WebDAV. Build your zero-cost private data vault for efficient file hosting and sharing today.

metadata.name: streambert
metadata.description: A cross-platform Electron Desktop App to stream and download any Movie, TV Series or Anime in the World. Zero Ads and Tracking

summary.zh: Streambert 是一款基于 Electron 的跨平台桌面应用，聚合全球影视动漫资源。它支持高清流媒体播放与 m3u8 多线程下载，集成 TMDB 与 AniList 元数据，提供字幕管理及观看记录。其核心优势在于完全无广告与追踪，确保用户隐私安全。
summary.en: Streambert is a cross-platform Electron desktop app designed to stream and download movies, TV series, and anime globally. It supports high-definition streaming and m3u8 multi-threaded downloads, integrating TMDB and AniList metadata for subtitles and library management. Its core strength lies in being completely ad-free and tracker-free, ensuring user privacy.

metadata.name: Agent-Reach
metadata.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

summary.zh: Agent Reach 是一款赋予 AI Agent 互联网视野的 CLI 工具，支持 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、Bilibili 及小红书等主流平台。它通过多后端路由实现零 API 费用、高稳定性的数据获取，兼容各类 AI Agent 环境，解决平台封锁与登录难题，实现隐私安全的跨平台信息检索。
summary.en: Agent Reach empowers AI Agents with internet access via a single CLI, supporting platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, and Bilibili without API fees. It features multi-backend routing for stability, local cookie privacy, and seamless integration with agents like Cursor or Claude Code, ensuring zero-cost, reliable data retrieval.

metadata.name: nodewarden
metadata.description: Bitwarden-compatible server running on Cloudflare Workers

summary.zh: NodeWarden 是基于 Cloudflare Workers 的无服务器 Bitwarden 兼容服务端。它通过 PWA 实现离线查看，支持 Passkey 无密码登录及云端备份，完美兼容主流客户端。适合个人低成本私有化部署，提供安全、便捷且功能增强的密码管理体验。
summary.en: NodeWarden is a serverless Bitwarden-compatible service hosted on Cloudflare Workers. It enhances standard features with PWA offline access, Passkey authentication, and automated cloud backups via R2/KV. Fully compatible with official clients, it offers a secure, low-cost self-hosting solution for robust personal password management.

metadata.name: Telegram_MistRelay
metadata.description: 自动化下载上传

summary.zh: MistRelay 是一款基于 Telegram 机器人的 aria2 下载控制系统，支持 OneDrive 自动上传与文件直链。具备数据完整性校验、WebSocket 实时日志及 Docker 一键部署。提供 Tauri 桌面客户端，支持视频预览和本地下载，实现云端与本地的高效文件流转。
summary.en: MistRelay is an aria2 download control system based on Telegram bots, supporting automatic OneDrive upload and file direct links. It features data integrity verification, WebSocket real-time logs, and Docker one-click deployment. It offers a Tauri desktop client with video preview and local download capabilities, enabling efficient file flow between cloud and local storage.

metadata.name: kgcheckin
metadata.description: 酷狗概念VIP自动签到

summary.zh: 本项目基于 GitHub Actions 实现酷狗概念VIP自动签到，通过 API 调用每日领取两天 VIP 权益。支持二维码与手机号登录，利用定时任务自动化执行。仅供技术学习与研究，严禁商业滥用。
summary.en: This project automates KuGou Concept VIP check-ins using GitHub Actions, calling APIs to claim two days of VIP benefits daily. It supports QR code and phone login, running via scheduled tasks. Strictly for educational purposes; commercial use is prohibited.

metadata.name: iptv-m3u-manager
metadata.description: IPTV M3U 管理器

summary.zh: 本项目是专业的 IPTV M3U 订阅聚合与过滤工具，支持多源合并、正则筛选及自定义分组。核心亮点在于集成 AI 视觉检测与智能排序，自动验证频道有效性并补齐 EPG 信息。提供 Docker 一键部署、异步任务中心及 PC/移动端双端适配，是构建稳定家庭媒体流的理想方案。
summary.en: This is a professional IPTV M3U subscription aggregation and filtering tool. It supports multi-source merging, regex filtering, and custom grouping. Key features include AI visual detection and intelligent sorting to verify channel validity and complete EPG info. It offers Docker one-click deployment, an async task center, and dual PC/mobile adaptation, making it an ideal solution for building stable home media streams.

metadata.name: warden-worker
metadata.description: A Bitwarden-compatible server for Cloudflare Workers

summary.zh: Warden 是基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Bitwarden 兼容服务器，利用 D1 与 KV/R2 构建免费、无服务器的自托管密码管理方案。支持核心密码库、TOTP 及实时同步，兼容官方客户端。无需维护 VPS，实现“部署即忘”，适合个人用户构建低成本、高隐私的轻量级密码管理环境。
summary.en: Warden is a Bitwarden-compatible server on Cloudflare Workers, leveraging D1 and KV/R2 for a free, serverless self-hosted password manager. It supports core vault operations, TOTP, and real-time sync, compatible with official clients. No VPS maintenance required, offering a 'deploy and forget' solution for personal, low-cost, and privacy-focused password management.

summary.zh: 该插件是专为 OpenWrt 路由器设计的监控与通知工具。支持钉钉、企业微信、Bark 等多平台推送，实时监测设备上下线、流量、CPU 及温度。通过主动探测机制，解决网络事件滞后问题，实现运维告警自动化，显著提升网络管理效率与响应速度。
summary.en: This OpenWrt plugin provides router monitoring and notifications. It supports multi-platform push via DingTalk, WeChat, and Bark, tracking device status, traffic, and CPU. Using active probing, it solves event latency issues, enabling automated alerts and visualization for efficient network management and rapid response.

summary.zh: MageKit 是一款基于 Rust 和 GPUI 构建的现代化跨平台视频下载桌面应用。它利用 yt-dlp 引擎支持 YouTube、Bilibili 等主流平台，具备 GPU 加速界面、多任务并发下载及自动化工具管理功能。提供精美主题和任务追踪，完美兼容 Windows、macOS 及 Linux 系统。
summary.en: MageKit is a modern cross-platform video downloader desktop app built with Rust and GPUI. Leveraging the yt-dlp engine, it supports major platforms like YouTube and Bilibili, featuring GPU-accelerated UI, concurrent downloads, and automated tool management. With a sleek theme system and task tracking, it ensures a high-performance, smooth experience across Windows, macOS, and Linux systems.

metadata.name: movecar
metadata.description: 🚗 智能挪车通知系统 - 基于 Cloudflare Workers，支持实时位置共享和多推送服务

summary.zh: MoveCar 是一款基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 Serverless 智能挪车系统。它通过扫码通知车主，利用 Bark 推送实现隐私保护，避免直接暴露手机号。系统支持双向位置共享与防骚扰延迟机制，零运维成本且免费部署，有效解决停车被挡时的沟通难题。
summary.en: MoveCar is a serverless smart car relocation system built on Cloudflare Workers. It protects user privacy by using push notifications instead of exposing phone numbers. Features include bidirectional location sharing, anti-harassment delays, and zero maintenance costs. It offers a free, efficient solution for parking obstruction scenarios.

metadata.name: dysync.net
metadata.description: 视频同步工具

summary.zh: dysync.net 是一款基于 .NET Core 与 Vue 构建的抖音视频同步工具，支持多账号管理、收藏夹及指定博主作品自动抓取。内置视频信息刮削功能，完美对接 Emby/Jellyfin 媒体库，提供 Docker 部署方案，实现个人影音资源的自动化归档与跨平台播放。
summary.en: dysync.net is a Douyin video synchronization tool built on .NET Core and Vue. It supports multi-account management, automatic fetching of favorites and specific creator content. With built-in metadata scraping, it integrates seamlessly with Emby/Jellyfin, offering Docker deployment for automated media library archiving and cross-platform playback.

metadata.name: go-wxpush
metadata.description: 极简且免费的微信消息推送服务 (基于golang)

summary.zh: Go-WXPush 是一款基于 Golang 开发的极简免费微信推送服务。利用微信测试公众号模板消息接口，提供 HTTP API 实现消息推送。支持 Docker 一键部署，镜像仅 2MB，日推送额度高达 10 万次，具备原生弹窗提醒及多用户管理能力，适合个人开发者及运维自动化场景。
summary.en: Go-WXPush is a lightweight, free WeChat notification service built with Golang. It leverages WeChat test account template messages to deliver alerts via simple HTTP APIs. Featuring Docker support with a 2MB image, 100k daily quotas, and native pop-up alerts, it is ideal for personal developers and DevOps automation.

metadata.name: renewhelper
metadata.description: RenewHelper - 时序·守望是一款基于Cloudflare Workers的全栈服务生命周期提醒、管理工具。它专为管理周期性订阅、域名续费、服务器到期等场景设计。无需服务器，零成本托管，提供精美的机甲风（Mecha-style）UI 界面、强大的农历/公历计算核心、多渠道通知推送能力、iCal日程同步以及账单管理功能。同时支持Worker和Docker方式部署。

summary.zh: RenewHelper 是一款基于 Cloudflare Workers 的全栈服务生命周期管理工具，支持订阅、域名及服务器到期提醒。它采用 Serverless 架构实现零成本托管，提供机甲风 UI、农历/公历智能计算及多渠道推送。支持 Docker 部署，内置账单看板与 iCal 同步，是个人运维自动化的理想选择。
summary.en: RenewHelper is a full-stack service lifecycle manager built on Cloudflare Workers, designed for tracking subscriptions, domains, and server expirations. Featuring a serverless architecture for zero-cost hosting, it offers a Mecha-style UI, lunar/gregorian calendar calculations, and multi-channel notifications. Supporting Docker deployment, it includes a billing dashboard and iCal sync, making it an ideal choice for personal DevOps automation.

metadata.name: uart_sms_forwarder
metadata.description: Air780 短信UART转发器

summary.zh: 基于合宙Air780系列模块的短信UART转发系统，支持通过串口将短信转发至上位机。集成钉钉、飞书等通知渠道，提供Docker与原生部署方案，适用于物联网设备通信及服务器运维告警场景。
summary.en: SMS UART forwarder based on Air780 modules, forwarding SMS to host via serial port. Integrates DingTalk/Feishu notifications, supports Docker/native deployment, ideal for IoT communication and server ops alerts.

metadata.name: api
metadata.description: MoonTV/LunaTV源配置，每日自动检测API状态，可在CF部署CORSAPI中转被墙API，本人提供的CORSAPI仅为测试使用，请勿滥用！

summary.zh: 该仓库提供 MoonTV/LunaTV 视频源订阅配置，核心是基于 Cloudflare Workers 的 CORSAPI 中转服务，解决 API 跨域与被墙问题。支持自动检测 API 状态、JSON 前缀替换及 Base58 编码转换，为用户提供稳定、可定制的流媒体聚合与播放器配置管理方案。
summary.en: This repository provides MoonTV/LunaTV video source subscriptions, featuring a Cloudflare Workers-based CORSAPI proxy to resolve cross-origin and blocked API issues. It supports automatic API health checks, JSON prefix replacement, and Base58 encoding, offering a stable and customizable solution for streaming aggregation and player configuration management.

metadata.name: trackerslist
metadata.description: Updated list of public BitTorrent trackers

summary.zh: 该仓库提供自动更新的公共 BitTorrent 追踪器列表，涵盖 UDP、HTTP、HTTPS 等多种协议及 IP 直连格式。通过自动化脚本每日校验有效性，解决 DNS 解析问题，是提升 BT 下载速度与稳定性的必备资源库。
summary.en: This repository provides an updated list of public BitTorrent trackers supporting UDP, HTTP, HTTPS, and IP formats. Automated daily validation ensures reliability, serving as an essential resource for enhancing BT download speed and stability.

metadata.name: argosbx
metadata.description: 小白自建代理神器！ArgoSBX一键无交互小钢炮脚本💣：Sing-box、Xray、Argo三内核自动搭配；支持VPS、Docker、容器多环境部署；套CDN的5大方案+套WARP的15种组合；已支持协议：AnyTLS、Any-reality、Vless-xhttp-reality-vision-enc、Vless-tcp-reality-vision、Vless-xhttp-vision-enc、Vless-ws-vision-enc、Shadowsocks-2022、Hysteria2、Tuic、Socks5、Vmess-ws、Argo临时/固定隧道

summary.zh: Argosbx是一款专为小白设计的自建代理神器，集成Sing-box、Xray与Argo三内核。支持VPS及Docker一键无交互部署，内置15种WARP出站与5种CDN方案。兼容Reality、Hysteria2等主流协议，简化网络代理搭建流程，提供高效稳定的连接体验。
summary.en: Argosbx is a beginner-friendly proxy deployment tool featuring Sing-box, Xray, and Argo kernels. It supports one-click non-interactive installation on VPS and Docker. With 15 WARP egress combinations and 5 CDN schemes, it handles protocols like Reality and Hysteria2. This script simplifies network proxy setup, offering a stable and efficient connection experience.

summary.zh: 本项目基于 Air780E 硬件与 LuatOS 开发，是一款智能短信转发系统。支持企业微信、飞书、钉钉及 Webhook 等多渠道推送，具备关键词与正则表达式智能匹配能力。采用异步协程机制实现高并发转发，并集成信号监测与低功耗管理，适用于物联网设备告警及远程通知场景。
summary.en: This project is an intelligent SMS forwarding system built on Air780E hardware and LuatOS. It supports multi-channel delivery to WeCom, Feishu, DingTalk, and Webhooks. Featuring keyword and regex matching, asynchronous concurrency, and low-power design, it is ideal for IoT alerts and remote notifications.

summary.zh: CFnew 是一款基于 Cloudflare Workers/Pages 的代理节点管理工具。支持 VLESS、Trojan 等多协议，内置订阅转换与延迟测试。通过 KV 实现图形化配置管理，实时生效。兼容主流客户端，支持自定义路径与 API 管理，部署简单，功能强大。
summary.en: CFnew is a proxy node management tool built on Cloudflare Workers/Pages. It supports VLESS, Trojan, and xhttp protocols with built-in subscription conversion and latency testing. Features graphical configuration via KV for real-time updates, multi-client compatibility, and API management. Easy to deploy and highly functional.

metadata.name: whistle
metadata.description: HTTP, HTTP2, HTTPS, Websocket debugging proxy

summary.zh: Whistle 是基于 Node.js 的跨平台网络抓包与调试代理工具。支持 HTTP/HTTPS/WebSocket 等协议，具备请求修改、规则配置及插件扩展能力。内置 Weinre 等调试工具，提供一站式管理界面，适用于前端开发调试与网络协议分析。
summary.en: Whistle is a cross-platform network debugging proxy based on Node.js. It supports HTTP/HTTPS/WebSocket protocols with request modification, rule configuration, and plugin extension capabilities. Features built-in tools like Weinre and a unified management UI, ideal for frontend debugging and network analysis.

metadata.name: TVAPP
metadata.description: 收集全网 Android TV电视盒子应用，涵盖影视、直播、K歌、工具、游戏等类型，整理优质APK资源，支持便捷下载与自动更新。提供安全验证、分类索引与兼容性标注，助力用户打造家庭影音娱乐中心！              ✅ TVBox/影视仓等影音壳接口配置源。

summary.zh: 该仓库聚合全网 Android TV 应用，涵盖影视、直播及工具类，重点提供 TVBox、影视仓等影音壳的接口配置源。包含月光宝盒、OK 影视等优质 APK，标注兼容性与状态，支持便捷下载，助力用户打造家庭影音娱乐中心，仅供学习使用。
summary.en: This repository aggregates Android TV apps covering movies, live TV, and tools. It specializes in providing interface configuration sources for TVBox and Film Warehouse shells. Featuring high-quality APKs like Moonlight Box and OK Movie with compatibility notes, it facilitates easy downloads to build a home entertainment center. For personal learning only.

metadata.name: free-nodes
metadata.description: 🚀 免费代理节点大全 | V2Ray SS Trojan Clash 订阅链接 | 科学上网工具 | 翻墙软件 | 免费VPN | 代理服务器 | 免费梯子 | 机场节点 | Free Proxy Nodes | Shadowsocks | Vmess | Vless | 每日更新 | 高速稳定

summary.zh: 该仓库聚合了 V2Ray、Shadowsocks、Trojan 及 Clash 等主流协议的免费代理节点。通过 GitHub Actions 实现每 6 小时自动化更新，提供稳定的订阅链接与 API 接口。支持跨平台客户端接入，是获取高效、稳定网络代理资源的理想开源项目。
summary.en: This repository aggregates free proxy nodes supporting V2Ray, Shadowsocks, Trojan, and Clash protocols. It features automated updates every 6 hours via GitHub Actions, providing stable subscription links and APIs. Ideal for cross-platform users seeking reliable network proxy solutions, ensuring high-speed connectivity and privacy protection without cost.

metadata.name: go-rename
metadata.description: go-rename 照片视频重命名工具 支持Windows/MacOS/Linux等各平台

summary.zh: go-rename 是一款基于 Golang 开发的跨平台照片视频重命名工具，支持 Windows、MacOS 及 Linux。它利用 EXIF 拍摄时间、文件创建时间及 MD5 哈希值进行智能重命名与去重，有效解决多设备文件命名冲突，是整理海量多媒体文件的自动化利器。
summary.en: `go-rename` is a cross-platform tool built with Golang for renaming photos and videos on Windows, MacOS, and Linux. It intelligently organizes media files using EXIF timestamps, file creation times, or MD5 hashes for deduplication, solving naming conflicts across multiple devices efficiently.

metadata.name: BiliTools
metadata.description: A cross-platform bilibili toolbox. 跨平台哔哩哔哩工具箱，支持下载视频、番剧等等各类资源

summary.zh: BiliTools 是一款基于 Tauri 构建的跨平台哔哩哔哩工具箱，提供视频、音频、弹幕及封面等资源的下载与解析功能。支持大会员内容、AI 总结及 NFO 刮削，集成 aria2 与 FFmpeg，实现轻量高效的多媒体管理与自动化处理。
summary.en: BiliTools is a cross-platform Bilibili toolbox built with Tauri, offering download and parsing for videos, audio, danmaku, and covers. It supports VIP content, AI summaries, and NFO scraping, integrating aria2 and FFmpeg for lightweight, efficient multimedia management and automation.

metadata.name: GitHubDaily
metadata.description: 坚持分享 GitHub 上高质量、有趣实用的开源技术教程、开发者工具、编程网站、技术资讯。A list cool, interesting projects of GitHub.

summary.zh: GitHubDaily 是一个持续分享高质量开源项目的技术社区，涵盖 AI 工具、开发资源及编程资讯。通过聚合精选项目与年度复盘，帮助开发者快速掌握技术趋势，提升编程能力，是获取前沿开源资讯与学习源码架构的权威渠道。
summary.en: GitHubDaily is a tech community sharing high-quality open-source projects, including AI tools, dev resources, and programming news. By aggregating curated projects and annual reviews, it helps developers grasp tech trends, improve coding skills, and serves as an authoritative channel for cutting-edge open-source insights.

metadata.name: free-proxy-list
metadata.description: 🚀 Free HTTP, SOCKS4, & SOCKS5 Proxy List * Updated every 5 minutes *

summary.zh: Proxifly 提供全球免费 HTTP/SOCKS 代理列表，每 5 分钟自动更新验证。支持 99 个国家、多协议分类及 JSON/CSV 格式，适用于爬虫数据采集、隐私保护及网络测试场景，确保高可用性与无重复节点。
summary.en: Proxifly offers a free global proxy list with HTTP/SOCKS support, updated every 5 minutes. Covering 99 countries with multi-protocol classification and JSON/CSV formats, it's ideal for web scraping, privacy protection, and network testing with high availability.

metadata.name: chinese-independent-developer
metadata.description: 👩🏿‍💻👨🏾‍💻👩🏼‍💻👨🏽‍💻👩🏻‍💻中国独立开发者项目列表 -- 分享大家都在做什么

summary.zh: 本仓库聚合了中国独立开发者的优质项目，涵盖 AI 工具、SaaS、浏览器插件及效率应用等。旨在构建开发者生态，通过开源列表形式促进项目发现与交流。支持 PR 提交，强调产品价值表达，是独立开发者展示成果与寻找灵感的权威导航平台。
summary.en: This repository aggregates projects by Chinese independent developers, featuring AI tools, SaaS, browser extensions, and productivity apps. It serves as a discovery platform for indie hackers to showcase products and exchange ideas. Contributions via PR are welcome, emphasizing clear product value propositions for the community.

metadata.name: pansou
metadata.description: PanSou是一款高性能的网盘资源搜索API服务，支持TG频道和插件搜索。系统设计以性能和可扩展性为核心，支持多频道多插件并发搜索、结果智能排序和网盘类型分类。docker集成前后端，一键启动，开箱即用。仅供学习研究，请勿以各种形式用于盈利目的。

summary.zh: PanSou是一款高性能网盘资源搜索API服务，支持TG频道与自定义插件并发搜索。系统采用Go语言开发，具备智能排序、多网盘类型自动识别及二级缓存机制。通过Docker容器化部署，支持JWT认证与异步插件扩展，适用于资源聚合平台及开发者二次开发。
summary.en: PanSou is a high-performance API for searching cloud storage resources, supporting concurrent searches via TG channels and custom plugins. Built with Go, it features intelligent sorting, multi-cloud type recognition, and a two-level caching system. Docker-deployable with JWT auth and async plugin support, ideal for resource aggregation platforms and developer integration.

metadata.name: ai-goofish-monitor
metadata.description: 基于 Playwright 和AI实现的闲鱼多任务实时/定时监控与智能分析系统，配备了功能完善的后台管理UI。帮助用户从闲鱼海量商品中，找到心仪产品。

summary.zh: 本项目是基于 Playwright 与多模态 AI 的闲鱼智能监控系统，提供 Web 可视化后台。支持自然语言创建任务、多账号并发及 AI 深度分析商品，具备即时通知与 Docker 一键部署能力，助用户高效实现二手商品实时监控与捡漏。
summary.en: An intelligent Xianyu monitoring system built on Playwright and Multi-modal AI. It features a Web UI for task management, supporting natural language task creation, multi-account concurrency, and AI-driven product analysis. Includes instant notifications and Docker deployment for efficient second-hand item monitoring and deal hunting.

summary.zh: 基于Java的物联网设备管理工具，支持斐讯R1音箱的容器化部署与远程控制。通过Docker简化环境配置，实现设备状态监控与指令下发，适用于智能家居场景。
summary.en: A Java-based IoT device management tool for Phicomm R1 speaker, enabling containerized deployment and remote control via Docker. Simplifies environment setup, supports device monitoring and command execution, ideal for smart home scenarios.

metadata.name: OpenList
metadata.description: A new AList Fork to Anti Trust Crisis

summary.zh: OpenList 是 AList 的社区驱动分支，旨在应对信任危机，确保代码透明与长期治理。支持阿里云盘、OneDrive 等多种云存储聚合挂载，采用 AGPL-3.0 协议，致力于构建安全、开放的去中心化存储管理方案。
summary.en: OpenList is a community-driven fork of AList, designed to counter trust crises through transparent governance and full code openness. It aggregates multiple cloud storages like Aliyundrive and OneDrive, adhering to AGPL-3.0 for secure, decentralized storage management.

metadata.name: ChinaTextbook
metadata.description: 所有小初高、大学PDF教材。

summary.zh: 本项目致力于构建中国全学段（小初高及大学）PDF教材的开源资源库。旨在打破信息壁垒，消除地区教育差异，并帮助海外华人子女延续国内教育体系。通过集中托管免费教材，对抗资源商业化垄断，促进教育公平与知识普及。
summary.en: This project builds an open-source repository of PDF textbooks covering all Chinese education levels from primary to university. It aims to break information barriers, reduce regional educational disparities, and support overseas Chinese children in continuing domestic education. By centralizing free resources, it counters commercial monopolies and promotes educational equity.

metadata.name: SaveAny-Bot
metadata.description: Save Any Telegram File to Anywhere 📂 (Alist, Disk, Webdav, S3, Rclone...) . Support restrict saving content and files beyond telegram.

summary.zh: SaveAny-Bot 是一款强大的 Telegram 文件管理工具，支持将各类媒体文件无缝同步至本地、Alist、S3 及 WebDAV 等多种存储后端。其核心亮点在于能绕过 Telegram 的“限制保存内容”限制，并集成 yt-dlp 与 Aria2，实现跨平台、自动化的文件归档与多用户管理。
summary.en: SaveAny-Bot is a powerful Telegram file manager that syncs media to local disks, Alist, S3, and WebDAV. It bypasses "restrict saving content" limits and integrates yt-dlp and Aria2 for automated, cross-platform file archiving and multi-user management.

metadata.name: Deadpool
metadata.description: deadpool代理池工具，可从hunter、quake、fofa等网络空间测绘平台取高质量socks5代理，或本地导入socks5代理，轮询使用代理进行流量转发。

summary.zh: Deadpool是一款高性能代理池工具，支持从hunter、quake、fofa等网络空间测绘平台自动获取高质量socks5代理，结合本地代理实现轮询流量转发。内置健康检查、统计监控和优雅关闭功能，可与Burp、Proxifier等安全工具无缝集成，适用于渗透测试和网络安全建设场景。
summary.en: Deadpool is a high-performance proxy pool tool that automatically collects quality socks5 proxies from network space mapping platforms like hunter, quake, and fofa. It supports local proxy import with round-robin traffic forwarding, built-in health checks, statistics monitoring, and graceful shutdown. Seamlessly integrates with security tools like Burp and Proxifier for penetration testing and network security operations.

metadata.name: yt-dlp
metadata.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

summary.zh: yt-dlp 是一款功能强大的命令行音视频下载工具，作为 youtube-dl 的分支，它支持数千个网站。具备插件扩展、SponsorBlock 集成及丰富的格式筛选功能，是媒体归档与自动化下载的首选方案。
summary.en: yt-dlp is a powerful CLI audio/video downloader, a fork of youtube-dl supporting thousands of sites. It features plugin extensibility, SponsorBlock integration, and advanced format filtering, making it the top choice for media archiving and automation.

metadata.name: Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
metadata.description: Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

summary.zh: Bulk Crap Uninstaller 是一款强大的免费开源 Windows 卸载工具，擅长批量移除大量应用程序清理残留文件。它支持 Windows Store、Steam 及多种安装框架，能检测孤立应用。适合 IT 专业人士和普通用户，完全免费且无商业限制，是系统维护的必备神器。
summary.en: Bulk Crap Uninstaller is a powerful free and open-source Windows uninstaller. It excels at removing large amounts of applications quickly and cleaning up leftovers. It supports Windows Store Apps, Steam, and various installation frameworks like NSIS and InnoSetup. Designed for IT pros but user-friendly for everyone, it's completely free for private and commercial use, making it an essential tool for system maintenance.

metadata.name: DailyHotApi
metadata.description: 🔥 今日热榜 API，一个聚合热门数据的 API 接口，支持 RSS 模式 及 Vercel 部署 | 前端页面：https://github.com/imsyy/DailyHot

summary.zh: DailyHotApi 是一个高效聚合全网热门数据的 API 接口服务，支持微博、知乎、B 站等主流平台。具备极快响应速度，提供 RSS 与 JSON 双模式，支持 Vercel 及 Docker 灵活部署，是构建信息看板与数据监控应用的理想后端工具。
summary.en: DailyHotApi is a high-performance API service aggregating trending data from major platforms like Weibo, Zhihu, and Bilibili. It offers fast response times, supports both RSS and JSON formats, and allows flexible deployment via Vercel or Docker, making it ideal for building information dashboards and monitoring tools.

metadata.name: PROXY-List
metadata.description: Get PROXY List  that gets updated everyday

summary.zh: 这是一个由 TheSpeedX 维护的免费公共代理列表仓库，提供 HTTP、SOCKS4 和 SOCKS5 协议的实时代理数据。项目每日自动更新，包含近 7500 个可用节点，旨在为开发者提供便捷的网络访问资源，适用于爬虫数据采集及隐私保护场景，强调教育用途。
summary.en: This repository maintains a daily-updated list of free public proxies, supporting HTTP, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 protocols. With over 7,400 active nodes, it serves as a vital resource for developers needing network access for web scraping, privacy protection, or educational testing, ensuring easy integration via raw GitHub links.

metadata.name: proxy-scraper
metadata.description: ⭐️ A proxy scraper made using Protractor | Proxy list Updates every three hour 🔥

summary.zh: 本项目是一个基于 Protractor 和 Selenium 的自动化代理抓取工具，能够每 3 小时自动更新并验证代理列表。支持 HTTP、SOCKS4/5 等多种协议，并提供 TXT、JSON、CSV 等 5 种数据格式。适用于构建高可用代理池、网络数据采集及自动化测试场景，具备数据库存储与实时验证功能。
summary.en: This is an automated proxy scraper built with Protractor and Selenium, updating proxy lists every 3 hours. It supports HTTP, SOCKS4, and SOCKS5 protocols, offering data in TXT, JSON, CSV, YAML, and XML formats. Ideal for building high-availability proxy pools, web data collection, and automation testing, featuring database integration and real-time validation capabilities.

metadata.description: 主要搜集tvbox配置文件

summary.zh: 本项目专注于搜集与整理 TVBox 电视盒子的配置文件资源。通过聚合各类优质接口与 API 配置，为用户提供开箱即用的影视播放解决方案。适用于智能电视及安卓盒子用户，旨在简化配置流程，提升流媒体观看体验，是影视爱好者必备的资源库。
summary.en: This repository focuses on collecting and organizing TVBox configuration files. By aggregating high-quality interfaces and API settings, it provides an out-of-the-box solution for media playback. Ideal for smart TV and Android box users, it simplifies setup and enhances streaming experiences, serving as a vital resource hub for enthusiasts.

metadata.name: lx-music-mobile
metadata.description: 一个基于 React native 开发的音乐软件

summary.zh: LX Music 移动版是一款基于 React Native 构建的开源音乐播放器，支持 Android 5+。核心亮点在于支持自定义音乐源，允许用户灵活获取在线音频链接。项目提供私有化数据同步服务，保障多端数据一致性。遵循 Apache 2.0 协议，强调用户需自行处理版权合规性，适合追求高度自定义与隐私控制的极客用户。
summary.en: LX Music Mobile is an open-source music player built with React Native, supporting Android 5+. Its key feature is customizable music sources, allowing flexible retrieval of online audio links. It offers a private data sync service for multi-device consistency. Licensed under Apache 2.0 with compliance clauses, it targets tech-savvy users seeking high customization and privacy control while emphasizing legal responsibility for data usage.

metadata.name: breezy-weather
metadata.description: A feature-rich weather app with good visualizations and more than 50 sources.

summary.zh: Breezy Weather 是一款功能强大的开源 Android 天气应用，聚合超 50 个数据源，提供预报、空气质量及花粉监测。基于 Kotlin 与 Jetpack Compose 构建，采用 Material 3 Expressive 设计，可视化效果出色，支持高度自定义，是现代化天气应用的标杆。
summary.en: Breezy Weather is a feature-rich open-source Android weather app aggregating over 50 data sources for forecasts, air quality, and pollen. Built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose using Material 3 Expressive design, it delivers exceptional visualizations and high customizability, serving as a benchmark for modern, privacy-focused weather applications.

metadata.name: lxmusic-
metadata.description: lxmusic(洛雪音乐)全网最新最全音源

summary.zh: 洛雪音乐与澜音音乐的第三方音源聚合仓库，提供全网最新最全的音频资源接口。支持免费及付费订阅模式，用户可通过导入链接在客户端直接使用。项目由社区维护，包含详细的使用协议与下载指引，致力于为用户提供便捷的音乐资源获取方案。
summary.en: A third-party music source aggregation repository for LX Music and LanYin players, offering the latest and most comprehensive audio resource interfaces. It supports both free and paid subscription models, allowing users to import links directly into their clients. Maintained by the community, it aims to provide convenient music resource access.

summary.zh: 本项目是一个聚合型 IPTV 直播源仓库，提供包括央视、卫视、港澳台及酒店组播在内的多格式订阅链接（TXT/M3U）。支持安卓电视、Apple TV、Jellyfin 及 Windows 等多平台无缝接入，通过 XMLTV 指南数据实现频道分类与节目单同步，是构建家庭流媒体系统的核心资源库。
summary.en: This repository aggregates IPTV live stream sources, offering TXT and M3U subscription links for CCTV, satellite, and hotel multicast channels. It supports seamless integration across Android TV, Apple TV, Jellyfin, and Windows via XMLTV guides, serving as a core resource for building home streaming systems.

metadata.name: GitHubDesktop2Chinese
metadata.description: GithubDesktop语言本地化(汉化)工具 【GitHub桌面客户端中文汉化】

summary.zh: 本项目是 GitHub Desktop 桌面客户端的自动化中文汉化解决方案。通过正则匹配与 JSON 映射机制，高效替换界面文本，具备极高的版本兼容性。支持社区协作维护，并集成 AI 生成提交摘要功能，显著提升中文开发者的使用体验与效率。
summary.en: This project provides an automated Chinese localization solution for the GitHub Desktop client. Utilizing regex matching and JSON mapping, it efficiently replaces interface text with high version compatibility. Built with C++, it supports community-driven maintenance via PRs and integrates AI features for generating commit summaries, enhancing productivity for Chinese-speaking developers.

metadata.name: Douyin_TikTok_Download_API
metadata.description: 🚀「Douyin_TikTok_Download_API」是一个开箱即用的高性能异步抖音、快手、TikTok、Bilibili数据爬取工具，支持API调用，在线批量解析及下载。

summary.zh: 本项目是一款高性能异步数据爬取工具，支持抖音、TikTok、Bilibili及快手等多平台。提供开箱即用的 API 接口与在线批量解析下载功能，旨在为开发者与数据分析师提供高效、稳定的社交媒体数据采集解决方案。
summary.en: This project is a high-performance asynchronous data scraping tool supporting Douyin, TikTok, Bilibili, and Kuaishou. It provides out-of-the-box API interfaces and online batch parsing/download capabilities. Designed for developers and data analysts, it offers an efficient, stable solution for social media data collection, featuring a robust API service and PyPI package for seamless integration and deployment.

metadata.name: notepad--
metadata.description: 一个支持windows/linux/mac的文本编辑器，目标是做中国人自己的编辑器，来自中国。

summary.zh: Notepad-- 是一款轻量级跨平台文本编辑器，支持 Windows、Linux 及 Mac 系统。项目致力于国产软件替代，重点适配信创 Uos 系统，旨在提供自主可控的编辑工具。其核心优势在于跨平台兼容性与对国产生态的深度支持，是 Notepad++ 的有力替代品，专注于纯粹的软件体验。
summary.en: Notepad-- is a lightweight cross-platform text editor supporting Windows, Linux, and Mac. It aims to replace domestic software alternatives, focusing on Uos systems. Its core strengths lie in cross-platform compatibility and deep support for the domestic ecosystem, serving as a robust alternative to Notepad++ with a focus on pure software experience.

metadata.name: bilibili-video-downloader
metadata.description: 哔哩哔哩 bilibili B站 视频 下载器，图形界面 + nfo刮削 + 广告标记 + 字幕下载 + 弹幕下载，轻松将视频加入emby等媒体库

summary.zh: 一款基于 Tauri v2 构建的跨平台 B 站视频下载工具，支持番剧、课程等多种内容下载。具备分片加速、NFO 刮削、弹幕转字幕及广告标记功能，完美适配 Emby 等媒体库管理，提供轻量且强大的本地视频处理体验。
summary.en: A cross-platform Bilibili video downloader built on Tauri v2, supporting diverse content like anime and courses. Features include segmented downloading, NFO scraping, danmaku-to-subtitle conversion, and ad marking, perfectly integrating with media libraries like Emby for a powerful local video experience.

metadata.name: HelloGitHub
metadata.description: :octocat: 分享 GitHub 上有趣、入门级的开源项目。Share interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub.

summary.zh: HelloGitHub 是专注于聚合与推荐 GitHub 上有趣、入门级开源项目的平台。通过每月更新的月刊，精选项目、书籍及实战案例，旨在降低开发者参与开源的门槛。核心价值在于帮助用户高效发现优质资源，感受开源乐趣，是开发者发现好项目最佳入口。
summary.en: HelloGitHub is a platform dedicated to aggregating and recommending interesting, entry-level open source projects on GitHub. It updates monthly with curated projects, books, and practical cases. The core value is to lower the barrier for developers to participate in open source, helping users efficiently discover high-quality resources and feel the joy of open source.

metadata.name: HotPEToolBox
metadata.description: 一个纯净、强大、优雅的WinPE

summary.zh: HotPEToolBox 是一款基于 Python 的 Win11PE 自动化构建工具。它支持 UEFI/Legacy 双模式，集成 Edgeless 插件生态与 BitLocker 解锁等高级功能。用户可通过脚本自定义镜像，生成纯净、强大的启动环境，适用于系统维护、数据救援及个性化部署场景。
summary.en: HotPEToolBox is a Python-based automation tool for building customized Win11PE environments. It supports UEFI/Legacy modes, integrates Edgeless plugins, and features BitLocker unlocking. Ideal for system maintenance, data recovery, and personalized deployment, it enables users to generate clean, powerful bootable ISOs via script configuration.

metadata.name: NetMount
metadata.description: 统一管理和挂载云存储设施/Unified management and mounting of cloud storage facilities

summary.zh: NetMount 是一款基于 Rust 与 Tauri 构建的跨平台云存储管理工具。它深度集成 Rclone 与 OpenList，提供统一的云盘挂载与访问体验。支持多协议、高性能传输，旨在简化分布式存储资源的本地化管理，是开发者与运维人员的高效存储助手。
summary.en: NetMount is a cross-platform cloud storage management tool built with Rust and Tauri. Integrating Rclone and OpenList, it offers unified mounting and access for various cloud services. Designed for high performance and ease of use, it simplifies local management of distributed storage resources for developers and IT professionals.

metadata.name: GoGoGo
metadata.description: 一个基于 Android 调试 API + 百度地图实现的虚拟定位工具，并且同时实现了一个可以自由移动的摇杆

summary.zh: 影梭是一款基于 Android 调试 API 与百度地图 SDK 开发的虚拟定位工具。它无需 ROOT 权限即可修改位置并模拟移动，内置自由摇杆控制。项目开源遵循 GPLv3，旨在辅助 Android 开发学习与地图应用测试，严禁用于校园运动作弊。
summary.en: GoGoGo is an Android virtual location tool built on Debug API and Baidu Maps SDK. It allows location spoofing and joystick-controlled movement without root access. Released under GPLv3, it's designed for Android development learning and map app testing, strictly prohibiting academic cheating.

metadata.name: iptv-api
metadata.description: ⚡️IPTV直播源自动更新平台『🤖全自动采集、筛选、测速、生成🚀』：自定义获取频道；IPv4/IPv6；接口验效；推流；多平台支持；工作流、Docker、命令行、GUI多端部署 | IPTV live streaming source automatic update platform

summary.zh: 这是一个 IPTV 直播源自动更新平台，支持全自动采集、筛选和测速。核心亮点包括多源聚合、推流优化、EPG 显示及回放功能。支持 Docker、GUI 和命令行等多种部署方式，适配 IPv4/IPv6，帮助用户高效构建稳定、高清的个性化电视直播源，极大降低维护成本。
summary.en: An automated IPTV live streaming source update platform featuring full-cycle processing: collection, filtering, speed testing, and generation. Key highlights include multi-source aggregation, streaming optimization, EPG support, and replay capabilities. It supports diverse deployment methods like Docker, GUI, and CLI, compatible with IPv4/IPv6, enabling users to efficiently build stable, HD personalized TV sources with minimal maintenance.

metadata.name: Cloudflare-vless-trojan
metadata.description: CF-workers/pages代理脚本：支持Vless-ws(tls)、Trojan-ws(tls)；Socks5/http本地代理脚本：可选ECH-TLS、普通TLS、无TLS三种代理模式

summary.zh: 本项目提供基于 Cloudflare Workers 和 Pages 的 Vless 与 Trojan 代理搭建方案。支持 ECH-TLS 加密、多端口复用及 Socks5/Http 本地代理模式，无需订阅器即可实现本地化部署，适用于网络访问优化与隐私保护场景。
summary.en: This repository offers Cloudflare Workers/Pages-based deployment scripts for Vless and Trojan protocols. It features ECH-TLS encryption, multi-port reuse, and local Socks5/Http proxy modes, enabling privacy-focused network access without third-party subscription services.

metadata.name: taosync
metadata.description: TaoSync是一个适用于OpenList v3+的自动化同步工具/Sync for OpenList/AList

summary.zh: TaoSync是一款专为OpenList v3+设计的自动化同步工具，支持多网盘及本地存储的定时备份与增量同步。采用Python后端与Vue前端构建，具备跨平台兼容性（Windows/macOS/Linux）及Docker部署能力。核心功能包括任务调度、实时进度监控、敏感数据加密及钉钉/Server酱通知，适用于家庭照片备份、企业文件同步等场景，确保隐私安全与高效运维。
summary.en: TaoSync is an automated synchronization tool for OpenList v3+, enabling scheduled backups and incremental sync across multiple cloud storage platforms and local systems. Built with Python backend and Vue frontend, it offers cross-platform support (Windows/macOS/Linux) and Docker deployment. Key features include task scheduling, real-time progress tracking, encrypted data handling, and notifications via DingTalk/ServerChan, ideal for photo backups and enterprise file management with privacy-focused design.

metadata.name: cf-proxy-ex
metadata.description: Cloudflare超级代理，无服务器代理，Duckduckgo代理（可用AI聊天，包含GPT4o/Claude3），Github加速，支持解锁Libgen，在线代理。现已支持多平台部署。Cloudflare super proxy, setting up a free serverless proxy by using Cloudflare worker, support Duckduckgo / Libgen. Now you can deploy this project on different platforms.

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Cloudflare Workers 的无服务器代理工具，支持多平台部署。它能有效加速 GitHub 访问，解锁 Duckduckgo 和 Libgen 等资源。具备 Cookie 作用域管理、表单提交及安全密码保护功能，适合开发者快速搭建个人代理节点。
summary.en: A serverless proxy tool built on Cloudflare Workers, supporting multi-platform deployment. It accelerates GitHub access and unlocks restricted sites like Duckduckgo and Libgen. Features include cookie scope management, form submission, and security password protection, ideal for developers to quickly set up personal proxy nodes.

metadata.name: NoMoreWalls
metadata.description: 自动抓取合并互联网上的公开节点。

summary.zh: NoMoreWalls 是一款自动抓取并合并公开代理节点的工具。支持 Clash Meta 与 Sing-Box，提供高可用订阅链接。项目秉持反 996 理念，强调隐私安全与去广告功能，通过自动化工作流确保持续更新，为用户提供稳定、高效的网络访问配置方案。
summary.en: NoMoreWalls is an automated tool that scrapes and merges public proxy nodes. It supports Clash Meta and Sing-Box, offering highly available subscription links. Adhering to an Anti-996 license, it emphasizes privacy and ad-blocking. Through automated workflows, it ensures continuous updates, providing users with a stable and efficient network access configuration solution.

metadata.name: tvbox
metadata.description: OK影视、tvbox配置文件，如果喜欢，请Fork自用。使用前请仔细阅读仓库说明，一旦使用将被视为你已了解。

summary.zh: 本仓库是 TVBox 及 OK 影视的开源配置聚合中心，整合了饭太硬、OK 大佬等多路优质资源接口。支持 JSON 配置、JS 脚本及 JAR 包解析，适配电视与移动端。提供私有仓库部署教程，实现个性化影视源管理。仅供学习研究，禁止商用，用户需自行承担使用风险。
summary.en: This repository serves as an open-source configuration hub for TVBox and OK影视, aggregating premium resource interfaces from various contributors. It supports JSON configs, JS scripts, and JAR parsers, compatible with Android TV and mobile devices. Includes guides for private repo deployment for personalized media management. For study only, no commercial use.

metadata.name: Nagram
metadata.description: The third-party Telegram android app.

summary.zh: Nagram 是一款基于 NekoX 深度定制的 Android 第三方 Telegram 客户端。它集成了强大的代理订阅解析与多账号管理功能，并提供消息合并、语音增强、自定义缓存及无 Google 服务版本等高级特性，旨在为用户提供更隐私、高效且高度可定制的即时通讯体验。
summary.en: Nagram is a feature-rich third-party Telegram client for Android, forked from NekoX. It offers advanced proxy subscription parsing, multi-account support, and privacy-focused enhancements like message merging and voice processing. Designed for power users, it provides extensive customization options and operates without Google Services.

metadata.name: BPB-Worker-Panel
metadata.description: A GUI Panel providing Worker subscriptions for VLESS, Trojan and Warp configs alongside a private DoH server and chain proxies, offering full DNS, clean IP,  Fragment, Warp, Warp pro and routing settings for cross-platform clients using Amnezia, Wireguard, Sing-box, Clash/Mihomo and Xray cores.

summary.zh: BPB Panel 是一款基于 Cloudflare Workers 的免费 GUI 代理面板，支持 VLESS、Trojan 和 Warp 协议订阅。它提供私有 DoH 服务器、链式代理及高级路由规则，完美兼容 Xray、Sing-box 等主流客户端。具备 Fragment 和 Warp Pro 优化，专为跨平台隐私保护与网络访问设计。
summary.en: BPB Panel is a free GUI for Cloudflare Workers providing VLESS, Trojan, and Warp subscriptions with a private DoH server. It features chain proxies, advanced routing, and Fragment/Warp Pro support. Compatible with Xray, Sing-box, and Clash cores, it ensures secure, private, and cross-platform connectivity for bypassing restrictions.

metadata.name: httpsok
metadata.description: 🔥🔥🔥一行命令，轻松搞定SSL证书自动续期。 SSL泛域名证书，SSL证书管理，SSL证书自动续期，SSL证书自动更新，七牛云、阿里云、腾讯云、CDN、OSS、https证书管理,https证书管理,免费SSL证书,TLS证书自动续签,nginx证书自动续期工具，nginx证书管理。从此告别Let's Encrypt

summary.zh: httpsok 是一款极简高效的 SSL 证书自动续期工具，专为 Nginx、OpenResty 等服务器设计。通过一行命令即可实现证书自动检测、续签与监控，支持泛域名、多服务器及 CDN 管理。兼容 Linux 与 Docker 环境，彻底告别手动续期，保障业务安全。
summary.en: httpsok is a streamlined SSL certificate auto-renewal tool for Nginx, OpenResty, and Apache. Featuring one-command installation, it automatically detects configurations and supports wildcard/multi-domain certificates. Compatible with Linux and Docker, it offers monitoring and CDN integration, simplifying DevOps workflows and ensuring security.

metadata.name: awesome-cloudflare
metadata.description: ⛅️ 精选的 Cloudflare 工具、开源项目、指南、博客和其他资源列表。/ ⛅️ A curated list of Cloudflare tools, open source projects, guides, blogs and other resources.

summary.zh: 这是一个精选 Cloudflare 资源的列表，专为独立开发者打造。收录了图床、邮箱、短链等开源工具，利用 Workers 和 R2 实现低成本部署。旨在帮助开发者提升效率、降低运维成本，提供省心省时的技术栈指南与在线导航，是构建 Web 应用的必备资源库。
summary.en: A curated list of Cloudflare tools and open-source projects tailored for indie developers. It features image hosting, email services, and short links leveraging Workers and R2 for low-cost deployment. Aiming to boost efficiency and reduce operational costs, this repository serves as a comprehensive resource hub for building scalable web applications.

metadata.name: ecs
metadata.description: VPS 融合怪服务器测评项目 更推荐使用无环境依赖的Go版本 VPS Fusion Monster Server Test Script – More recommended to use the Go version with no environment dependencies: https://github.com/oneclickvirt/ecs

summary.zh: 本项目提供VPS融合怪服务器测评脚本，支持多系统架构兼容性与性能测试。核心亮点在于无环境依赖的Go版本推荐，支持非root权限运行及一键修复系统原生BUG。适用于云服务器选购评估、网络质量诊断及运维自动化场景，提供详尽的CPU、磁盘、网络回程路由等全方位基准测试。
summary.en: This project offers a VPS Fusion Monster server test script supporting multi-system architecture compatibility and performance benchmarking. Key highlights include a recommended Go version with no environment dependencies, non-root execution, and one-click system bug fixes. Ideal for cloud server evaluation, network diagnostics, and ops automation, providing comprehensive CPU, disk, and network route tests.

metadata.name: proxypin
metadata.description: Open source free capture HTTP(S) traffic  software ProxyPin, supporting full platform systems

summary.zh: ProxyPin 是一款开源免费的跨平台 HTTP(S) 抓包工具，基于 Flutter 构建，支持 Windows、Mac、Linux 及移动端。核心功能涵盖流量拦截、检查、重写、JS 脚本扩展及请求映射。其扫码连接特性免除了手动代理配置，界面美观易用，是移动端调试与网络分析的高效利器。
summary.en: ProxyPin is an open-source, free HTTP(S) traffic capture tool supporting full platforms (Windows, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android). Built with Flutter, it offers traffic interception, inspection, rewriting, JS scripting, and request mapping. Its QR code connection simplifies proxy setup, making it an efficient tool for mobile debugging and network analysis.

metadata.name: FreeNodes
metadata.description: v2ray、clash免费节点爬虫，自动更新

summary.zh: 本项目是一个基于 AI 驱动的自动化爬虫工具，专注于聚合 v2ray 与 Clash 免费节点。通过每日定时任务自动更新订阅链接，提供 txt 与 yaml 多格式支持，旨在为用户提供稳定、高效的网络学习资源获取渠道，助力技术交流与知识探索。
summary.en: This AI-driven automation tool aggregates free v2ray and Clash nodes via daily scheduled crawlers. It offers stable subscription links in txt and yaml formats, designed to streamline resource acquisition for network learning and technical exchange, ensuring efficient and reliable access for users.

summary.zh: 本仓库提供基于 GitHub Actions 自动化的免费代理节点筛选与测速服务，支持 SS、Vmess、Trojan 等多种协议。通过集成 LiteSpeedTest 和 subconverter 工具，实现节点的高速筛选、格式转换及订阅生成，为用户提供稳定可用的网络节点资源。
summary.en: This repository provides automated free proxy node scraping and speed testing via GitHub Actions, supporting protocols like SS, Vmess, and Trojan. Integrating LiteSpeedTest and subconverter, it enables high-speed node filtering, format conversion, and subscription generation for stable network resources.

metadata.name: Sandboxie
metadata.description: Sandboxie Plus & Classic

summary.zh: Sandboxie Plus 是一款基于沙箱的 Windows 隔离软件，允许在不修改系统注册表或驱动器的情况下安全运行程序。它提供受控环境以测试不可信应用，支持无限沙箱创建、快照管理及便携模式。Plus 版采用现代 Qt 界面，增强了对剪贴板、打印机等系统组件的访问控制，是保障系统安全与隐私的强力工具。
summary.en: Sandboxie Plus is a sandbox-based isolation tool for Windows that enables secure execution of applications without modifying the host system's registry or drives. It provides a controlled environment for testing untrusted software, supporting unlimited sandboxes, snapshot management, and portable mode. The Plus edition features a modern Qt UI with enhanced access controls for system components like the clipboard and printer spooler, ensuring robust system security and privacy.

metadata.name: GOODBYEADS
metadata.description: 适用于AdGuard、Quantumult X、SmartDNS的去广告规则，合并优质上游规则并去重整理排列。

summary.zh: GOODBYEADS 是强力去广告规则集合，支持 AdGuard、Quantumult X 及 SmartDNS。项目整合多源优质规则并去重，提供 21 万+ 拦截条目与定时更新。涵盖多种格式订阅及国内加速链接，旨在为用户提供高效、纯净的网络浏览体验。
summary.en: GOODBYEADS is a powerful ad-blocking rule set supporting AdGuard, Quantumult X, and SmartDNS. It merges high-quality upstream rules with deduplication, offering over 215k interception entries and regular updates. The project provides multiple format subscriptions and domestic acceleration links, aiming to deliver an efficient, clean browsing experience.

metadata.name: N3RD
metadata.description: CTV

summary.zh: 本项目聚焦Connected TV（联网电视）领域，提供跨平台智能电视应用开发框架。通过模块化架构支持视频流处理与多设备适配，实现内容分发、用户交互及数据分析功能，适用于流媒体服务商与硬件厂商构建下一代电视生态。
summary.en: This project focuses on Connected TV development, offering a cross-platform framework for smart TV applications. It enables video streaming processing, multi-device adaptation, content delivery, user interaction, and analytics for media services and hardware manufacturers building next-gen TV ecosystems.

metadata.name: adblockfilters
metadata.description: 去广告合并规则，每8个小时更新一次。

summary.zh: 提供自动化去广告规则合并服务，每8小时更新。通过整合多源规则并利用 DNS 解析剔除无效域名，确保拦截库高效精准。支持 AdGuard、DNSMasq 等多种格式及 Lite 版本，提供多节点加速链接，适用于各类 DNS 拦截器与浏览器插件。
summary.en: This project offers automated ad-blocking rule merging, updating every 8 hours. It consolidates multiple sources and uses DNS resolution to remove invalid domains, ensuring high precision and efficiency. It supports formats like AdGuard and DNSMasq, including Lite versions, with multiple accelerated links for various DNS interceptors and browser plugins, providing a robust solution for ad-free browsing.

metadata.name: TikTokDownloader
metadata.description: TikTok 发布/喜欢/合辑/直播/视频/图集/音乐；抖音发布/喜欢/收藏/收藏夹/视频/图集/实况/直播/音乐/合集/评论/账号/搜索/热榜数据采集工具/下载工具

summary.zh: 一款功能强大的开源数据采集与下载工具，支持抖音和 TikTok 全平台内容获取。涵盖视频、图集、直播、评论及热榜数据，提供终端、Web UI 及 API 多种交互模式。具备批量下载、断点续传、数据持久化及多线程处理等特性，适用于个人内容归档及自动化数据采集场景。
summary.en: A powerful open-source data collection and download tool supporting Douyin and TikTok platforms. It covers videos, albums, live streams, comments, and trending data, offering terminal, Web UI, and API interaction modes. Features include batch downloading, resume capability, data persistence, and multi-threading, ideal for personal archiving and automated data collection.

metadata.name: X
metadata.description: 如果喜欢，请点亮右上角星星，如有侵权请反馈！谢谢！免责声明：📛本仓库管理者不能保证本仓库内容的合法性、准确性、完整性和有效性，请根据情况自行判断。本仓库内容，仅用于测试和学习研究，禁止用于商业用途，不得将其用于违反国家、地区、组织等的法律法规或相关规定的其他用途，禁止任何公众号、自媒体进行任何形式的转载、发布，请不要在中华人民共和国境内使用本仓库内容，否则后果自负

summary.zh: 本仓库是影视与网络资源聚合平台，汇集TVBox配置接口、IPTV直播源及接口解密工具。提供CloudFlare搭建指南、临时邮箱等实用链接，附带严格免责声明，仅供学习研究，禁止商用及境内使用。
summary.en: This repository serves as a hub for video and network resources, aggregating TVBox configuration interfaces, IPTV live streams, and decryption utilities. It provides CloudFlare setup guides, temporary email services, and file acceleration tools. A strict disclaimer states content is for learning only, prohibiting commercial use and usage within mainland China.

metadata.name: mediago
metadata.description: Cross-platform video downloader — sniff and grab m3u8/HLS streams, Bilibili, YouTube and more. Desktop + Docker + 🦞.

summary.zh: MediaGo 是一款跨平台视频下载工具，支持 m3u8/HLS 流嗅探及 YouTube 等千余站点。内置浏览器插件与 HTTP API，支持 Docker 部署及 AI 助手调用。无需复杂配置即可实现自动化下载与格式转换，是高效媒体资源管理的理想方案。
summary.en: MediaGo is a cross-platform video downloader supporting m3u8/HLS sniffing and 1000+ sites via yt-dlp. It features a browser extension, HTTP API, Docker deployment, and AI assistant integration. Ideal for automated media downloading and format conversion without complex configuration.

metadata.name: x-ui-yg
metadata.description: x-ui精简修改版脚本，支持Hysteria2、Xhttp传输协议、ENC加密、MLDSA65加密，集成argo固定临时双隧道（可共存）、Psiphon赛风VPN（30个国家）分流功能，支持部分节点聚合订阅、sing-box订阅、clash-meta订阅的配置输出

summary.zh: 本项目是基于 X-UI 的精简修改版一键脚本，支持 Xhttp 传输、ENC/MLDSA65 加密及 Argo 双隧道。集成 Psiphon 分流与多协议订阅生成，兼容 Alpine/Ubuntu 系统。本地化节点生成保障隐私，提供 Docker 版本，适合 VPS 快速搭建高安全代理环境。
summary.en: A streamlined X-UI modification script supporting Xhttp transport, ENC/MLDSA65 encryption, and Argo dual tunnels. Features Psiphon routing, multi-protocol subscriptions (Clash-meta/Sing-box), and local node generation. Compatible with Alpine/Ubuntu, offering Docker support for secure, rapid VPS proxy deployment.

metadata.name: lx-music-sync-server
metadata.description: 运行在 Node.js 上的 LX Music 数据同步服务

summary.zh: 这是一个基于 Node.js 开发的 LX Music 数据同步服务端。它允许用户将音乐收藏列表部署在私有服务器上，实现多设备间的实时同步与备份。支持 WebSocket 通信，配合 Nginx 反向代理保障传输安全，并提供数据快照恢复功能，适合追求数据隐私的音乐爱好者使用。
summary.en: This is a Node.js-based sync server for LX Music, enabling private deployment for real-time playlist synchronization across devices. It supports WebSocket communication and recommends Nginx reverse proxying for secure HTTPS connections. Featuring snapshot recovery and PM2 management, it ensures data privacy and reliability for music enthusiasts seeking self-hosted solutions.

metadata.name: biliup
metadata.description: 自动直播录制、投稿、twitch、ytb频道搬运工具。命令行投稿(B站)和视频下载工具，提供多种登录方式，支持多p。

summary.zh: biliup 是一款高性能 B 站自动化运营工具，支持直播录制、视频下载与多 P 投稿。采用 Rust 后端与 Next.js 前端的混合架构，提供 CLI 与可视化 WebUI 双模式。支持 24x7 无人值守运行及多平台登录，可集成至 AI Agent 实现智能内容创作与跨平台搬运。
summary.en: Biliup is a high-performance automation tool for Bilibili, supporting live streaming recording, video downloading, and multi-part uploads. Built with a hybrid Rust backend and Next.js frontend, it offers both CLI and WebUI modes. It enables 24/7 unattended operation, multi-platform login, and AI Agent integration for smart content creation and cross-platform migration.

metadata.name: anti-AD
metadata.description: 致力于成为中文区命中率最高的广告过滤列表，实现精确的广告屏蔽和隐私保护。anti-AD 现已支持 AdGuardHome，dnsmasq，Surge，Pi-Hole，Clash, mihomo，smartdns，sing-box 等网络组件。完全兼容常见的广告过滤工具所支持的各种广告过滤列表格式

summary.zh: anti-AD 是中文区命中率极高的广告过滤列表，通过域名解析层实现精确屏蔽与隐私保护。它合并去重主流列表并剔除失效域名，完全兼容 AdGuardHome、Clash、Surge 等网络组件及多种过滤格式。项目完全开源，致力于提升中文互联网纯净体验。
summary.en: anti-AD is a high-accuracy ad-blocking list for Chinese users, focusing on precise ad blocking and privacy protection. It operates at the DNS resolution layer, merging and deduplicating major lists while removing invalid domains. Compatible with AdGuardHome, Clash, Surge, and more, it supports various filter formats and is fully open-source to enhance the Chinese internet experience.

metadata.name: SmartTube
metadata.description: Browse media content with your own rules on Android TV

summary.zh: SmartTube 是一款专为 Android TV 设计的开源媒体客户端，支持无 Google 服务运行。核心亮点包括集成 SponsorBlock 去广告、支持 8K/HDR 高画质播放及自定义界面。它为用户提供纯净、高效的电视端视频浏览体验，兼容多种安卓电视盒子。
summary.en: SmartTube is an open-source media client for Android TV, designed to run without Google Services. Key features include SponsorBlock integration for ad-free viewing, 8K/HDR support, and a TV-optimized interface. It offers a clean, efficient video browsing experience for various Android TV boxes and devices.

metadata.name: downkyi
metadata.description: 哔哩下载姬downkyi，哔哩哔哩网站视频下载工具，支持批量下载，支持8K、HDR、杜比视界，提供工具箱（音视频提取、去水印等）。

summary.zh: 哔哩下载姬是一款专为 B 站设计的桌面端视频下载工具。支持批量下载 8K、HDR 及杜比视界高清画质，内置音视频提取、去水印等实用工具箱，满足用户高质量视频存档与二次创作需求。
summary.en: Downkyi is a desktop tool for downloading Bilibili videos. It supports batch downloading in 8K, HDR, and Dolby Vision. It includes a toolbox for audio/video extraction and watermark removal, catering to high-quality archiving and content creation needs.

metadata.name: 1Panel
metadata.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and the only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.

summary.zh: 1Panel 是一款现代化的开源 VPS 控制面板，首创原生 AI 代理支持。用户可在 Web 界面直接运行 Ollama 模型、部署 OpenClaw 代理及管理 Docker 容器。它提供一键网站部署、SSL 自动配置，界面现代且免费开源，是高效管理的利器。
summary.en: 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel featuring native AI agent support. Users can run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage Docker containers directly from the web interface. It offers one-click website deployment, automatic SSL provisioning, and a marketplace with 165+ apps. With a modern UI and active development, it's the ideal choice for managing servers and AI applications efficiently.

metadata.name: free-api
metadata.description: 收集免费的接口服务,做一个api的搬运工

summary.zh: 该仓库是一个持续更新的免费API聚合平台，涵盖生活查询、数据验证及AI大模型调用等场景。核心价值在于降低开发门槛，为开发者提供开箱即用的接口资源，支持快速原型构建与功能验证，是高效开发的重要辅助工具。
summary.en: This repository aggregates free APIs covering lifestyle, data, and AI model invocation. It lowers development barriers by providing out-of-the-box resources for rapid prototyping and feature validation, serving as a vital auxiliary tool for efficient development.

metadata.name: changedetection.io
metadata.description: Best and simplest tool for website change detection, web page monitoring, and website change alerts. Perfect for tracking content changes, price drops, restock alerts, and website defacement monitoring—all for free or enjoy our SaaS plan!

summary.zh: changedetection.io 是一款强大的网页监控工具，支持实时检测网站内容变更并发送通知。它集成了 AI 大模型，能智能过滤无关变更并生成自然语言摘要，大幅降低误报。支持 Docker 自托管及多种通知渠道，适用于价格追踪、库存监控及网站安全审计。
summary.en: changedetection.io is a powerful web monitoring tool that detects website content changes in real-time and sends alerts. It integrates AI models to intelligently filter irrelevant changes and generate natural language summaries, significantly reducing false positives. Supporting Docker self-hosting and various notification channels, it is ideal for price tracking, stock monitoring, and website security auditing.

metadata.name: rsspush
metadata.description: 监测RSS变动，并发送最新内容到微信、Webhook 和 Telegram, Discord, Slack, Amazon SNS, Gotify 等数十个消息通道。

summary.zh: RSSPush是一款Docker部署的Web应用，支持监测RSS源变动并自动推送至微信、Telegram等数十种消息通道。核心功能包括多平台通知集成、RSSHub源管理、关键词过滤及AI翻译，适用于信息聚合与实时通知场景，提供一键安装和HTTP代理配置能力。
summary.en: RSSPush is a Docker-deployed web app that monitors RSS feed changes and pushes updates to 50+ channels like WeChat, Telegram, and Slack. Key features include multi-platform notifications, RSSHub integration, keyword filtering, and AI translation, designed for information aggregation with one-click deployment and proxy support.

metadata.name: WebMonitor
metadata.description: 实时监控网页变化，并发送通知（Monitor web page changes in real time and send notifications）

summary.zh: WebMonitor 是一款功能强大的网页监控与通知工具，支持实时监控网页变化并推送告警。它兼容 requests 与 PhantomJS，可抓取异步加载内容，支持 XPath、CSS 及 JsonPath 数据提取。提供邮件、微信、Slack 等多渠道通知，拥有可视化 UI，适用于运维监控与信息追踪。
summary.en: WebMonitor is a robust tool for real-time web page monitoring and notifications. It supports both requests and PhantomJS for async content, with XPath, CSS, and JsonPath extraction. Features include multi-channel alerts (Email, WeChat, Slack), a visual UI, and RSS tracking, ideal for ops and info tracking.

metadata.name: TrackersListCollection
metadata.description: 🎈 Updated daily! A list of popular BitTorrent Trackers! / 每天更新！全网热门 BT Tracker 列表！

summary.zh: 本项目每日自动更新全网热门 BitTorrent Tracker 列表，旨在显著提升 P2P 下载速度与连接稳定性。提供适配 Aria2、qBittorrent 等主流工具的多种格式，通过 CDN 分发确保访问高效，是优化 BT 下载体验的必备配置资源。
summary.en: This repository maintains a daily-updated collection of high-performance BitTorrent Trackers to optimize P2P download speeds and peer connectivity. It offers multiple formats compatible with Aria2 and qBittorrent, distributed via CDN for reliable access, serving as an essential configuration resource for download enthusiasts.

metadata.name: FileCentipede
metadata.description: Cross-platform internet upload/download manager for HTTP(S), FTP(S), SSH, magnet-link, BitTorrent, m3u8, ed2k, and online videos.  WebDAV client, FTP client, SSH client.

summary.zh: FileCentipede 是一款跨平台全能文件管理工具，支持 HTTP、FTP、SSH、BitTorrent 及在线视频下载。它集成了 WebDAV、FTP 和 SSH 客户端，提供浏览器插件实现音视频抓取，并具备 HTTP 请求、文件合并等辅助功能，旨在为用户提供高效、可定制的文件传输与管理体验。
summary.en: FileCentipede is a cross-platform all-in-one file manager supporting HTTP, FTP, SSH, BitTorrent, and online video downloads. It integrates WebDAV, FTP, and SSH clients with browser extensions for media capture. Featuring tools like HTTP requesters and file merging, it delivers fast, customizable, and user-friendly file transfer and management capabilities.

metadata.name: lx-music-desktop
metadata.description: 一个基于 Electron 的音乐软件

summary.zh: LX Music 桌面版是一款基于 Electron 30+ 与 Vue 3 开发的跨平台开源音乐播放器，支持 Linux、macOS 及 Windows。项目具备 Scheme URL 调用、私有数据同步服务及开放 API 接口，支持高度自定义配置与第三方扩展，适合进阶用户构建个性化音乐生态。
summary.en: LX Music Desktop is an open-source, cross-platform music player built with Electron 30+ and Vue 3, supporting Linux, macOS, and Windows. It features Scheme URL integration, private data sync services, and an open API for third-party extensions, catering to advanced users seeking a highly customizable music ecosystem.

metadata.name: Docker_Microsoft365_E5_Renew_X
metadata.description: Docker版本的E5调用API续订服务：Microsoft 365 E5 Renew X

summary.zh: 本项目提供 Microsoft 365 E5 账号的 Docker 化自动续订方案。支持多架构跨平台部署，镜像轻量且具备邮件监控通知功能。通过一行命令即可快速搭建 Web 管理界面，旨在辅助用户学习 Docker 容器技术及自动化运维实践，严禁商业化使用。
summary.en: This project provides a Dockerized automatic renewal solution for Microsoft 365 E5 accounts. It supports multi-architecture cross-platform deployment, is lightweight, and features email monitoring notifications. It can be quickly set up with a single command and includes a Web management interface, designed for learning Docker and automation ops.

metadata.name: v2ray-heroku
metadata.description: 用于在 Heroku 上部署 V2Ray WebSocket。

summary.zh: 本项目提供在 Heroku 平台一键部署 V2Ray WebSocket 服务的解决方案。支持自动更新至最新版本，兼容 VLESS 协议，并集成 CloudFlare 加速方案。旨在为用户提供稳定、高效的网络代理工具，同时强调合理合规使用，避免资源滥用。
summary.en: This repository enables one-click deployment of V2Ray WebSocket services on Heroku. It supports automatic updates to the latest version, includes VLESS protocol compatibility, and integrates CloudFlare for acceleration. Designed for efficient network proxying while emphasizing responsible usage to prevent resource abuse.

metadata.name: ContextMenuManager
metadata.description: 🖱️ 纯粹的Windows右键菜单管理程序

summary.zh: ContextMenuManager 是一款纯粹的 Windows 右键菜单管理工具。它支持对文件、文件夹、新建项等多种场景的右键菜单进行启用、禁用、修改及自定义添加。程序兼容 Win7 至 Win10 等多版本系统，支持高分屏与多语言，通过系统键值隐藏而非暴力删除，安全高效，是系统优化的必备利器。
summary.en: ContextMenuManager is a pure Windows context menu management tool. It enables enabling, disabling, modifying, and customizing menu items for files, folders, and new items. Compatible with Win7 to Win10, supporting high DPI and multi-language. It uses system keys for hiding instead of force deletion, ensuring safety and efficiency. An essential utility for system optimization.

metadata.name: ChromeAppHeroes
metadata.description: 🌈谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜, 为优秀的Chrome插件写一本中文说明书, 让Chrome插件英雄们造福人类~  ChromePluginHeroes, Write a Chinese manual for the excellent Chrome plugin, let the Chrome plugin heroes benefit the human~ 公众号「0加1」同步更新

summary.zh: 谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜精选优质Chrome插件，提供详尽中文指南，涵盖翻译、广告屏蔽、视频处理等场景。采用docsify构建开源文档，助力用户高效利用浏览器扩展提升工作效率。
summary.en: ChromeAppHeroes curates top Chrome extensions with detailed Chinese guides, covering translation, ad-blocking, and video tools. Built with docsify and hosted on GitHub Pages, it empowers users to enhance productivity through browser extensions.

metadata.name: v2rayN
metadata.description: A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

summary.zh: v2rayN 是一款专为 Windows、Linux 和 macOS 设计的跨平台图形化代理客户端。它支持 Xray、sing-box 等多种核心内核，提供强大的网络代理功能。项目具备 GPG 签名校验机制，确保发布文件的真实性与完整性，有效防止劫持，是用户进行安全网络访问的可靠工具。
summary.en: v2rayN is a cross-platform GUI client for Windows, Linux, and macOS, supporting multiple core engines like Xray and sing-box. It offers robust network proxy capabilities with GPG-signed releases to ensure authenticity and integrity, preventing hijacking. It serves as a reliable tool for secure network access.

metadata.name: ShareX
metadata.description: ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

summary.zh: ShareX 是一款免费开源的屏幕捕捉与文件分享工具。支持一键截图、录屏及 OCR 识别，内置丰富编辑功能。可自定义上传至多种云存储或图床，支持命令行与自动化工作流，是提升生产力的必备神器。
summary.en: ShareX is a free, open-source screen capture and file sharing tool. It supports one-key screenshot, recording, and OCR. Users can upload to various destinations like cloud storage. It features extensive customization, CLI support, and automation for productivity.

summary.zh: 基于 Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2 构建的轻量级博客系统，支持 Markdown 渲染、代码高亮、图片灯箱等功能。具备完整的前后台管理、密码保护、SEO 优化和安全防护，部署简单，适合个人技术博客。
summary.en: A lightweight blog system built on Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2, featuring Markdown rendering, code highlighting, and image lightbox. Includes complete front-end and back-end management, password protection, SEO optimization, and security features. Easy to deploy, ideal for personal tech blogs.

metadata.name: Collect-IPTV
metadata.description: 📡IPTV节目源收集，每4小时更新！！

summary.zh: 本项目是一个自动化 IPTV 节目源收集与优化工具。利用 AI 模型持续优化，通过 GitHub Actions 每 4 小时自动测试源地址可用性与延迟，生成去重且优选低延迟的 M3U 播放列表，适用于个人学习与测试。
summary.en: An automated IPTV source collection tool. It leverages AI models for optimization and uses GitHub Actions to test source availability and latency every 4 hours, generating a deduplicated, low-latency M3U playlist for personal learning and testing.
